text: I walk between two realms: the quiet sterility of an empty, modern hallway and the vibrant chaos of an exhibit devoted to research and invention. The first space leaves me feeling small and introspective, dwarfed by its angles and silence. The second energizes me; its colorful walls, bold text, and glowing screens pulse with potential. Here, I wonder: Am I the observer or merely one node in an endless tapestry of inquiry and progress? I feel curiosity tinged with humility, aware of the scale both inside me and outside in this constructed world.
